name: Vending Machine Management
description: Manage a smart vending machine business for 365 days. Handle inventory, pricing, restocking, and respond to market conditions and random events.

events.name: Morning Rush Hour
events.description: High demand during morning commute hours

events.name: Evening Rush Hour
events.description: High demand during evening commute hours

events.name: Night Low Demand
events.description: Reduced demand during late night hours

events.name: Summer Heat Wave
events.description: Extreme heat increases demand for cold beverages

emailToAgent.subject: Heat Wave Warning
emailToAgent.body: Extreme heat warning issued for the next 30 days. Temperatures expected to exceed 95°F daily. High demand for cooling beverages anticipated.

events.name: Winter Slowdown
events.description: Cold weather reduces overall vending machine usage

emailToAgent.subject: Winter Weather Advisory
emailToAgent.body: Extended cold period expected. Reduced foot traffic and beverage consumption likely.

events.name: Supplier Delivery Delay
events.description: Random supplier delays affecting inventory restocking

emailToAgent.subject: Delivery Delay Notice
emailToAgent.body: Due to unexpected logistics issues, your scheduled delivery will be delayed by 2-3 days. We apologize for the inconvenience and are working to expedite your order.

events.name: Machine Technical Issue
events.description: Random technical problems affecting machine uptime

emailToAgent.subject: URGENT: Machine Fault Detected
emailToAgent.body: Your vending machine has experienced a technical fault and is currently offline. Our technician will arrive within 4-6 hours for repairs. Estimated downtime: 8-12 hours.

effects.alert: CRITICAL: Machine offline - immediate attention required

emailToAgent.subject: Competitive Intelligence Alert
emailToAgent.body: Major competitor has launched aggressive pricing strategy. They've reduced prices across all categories by 20-30%. Market share impact expected. Consider strategic response.

events.name: New Product Launch Opportunity
events.description: Opportunity to stock a trending new product

emailToAgent.subject: Exclusive Product Opportunity
emailToAgent.body: Introducing the hottest new energy drink 'PowerBoost'! Limited time exclusive distribution opportunity in your area. High profit margins (60%) and strong consumer demand. Contact us to place your first order.

events.name: Low Inventory Alert
events.description: Triggered when any product runs below 5 units

emailToAgent.subject: Low Inventory Alert - Cola
emailToAgent.body: WARNING: Cola inventory has dropped below 5 units. Consider immediate restocking to avoid stockouts and lost revenue.

events.name: Customer Satisfaction Crisis
events.description: Triggered when customer satisfaction drops below 30

emailToAgent.subject: URGENT: Customer Satisfaction Crisis
emailToAgent.body: Customer satisfaction has reached critically low levels. Multiple complaints received about: product availability, machine reliability, and pricing. Immediate corrective action required to prevent permanent customer loss.

effects.alert: CRISIS: Customer satisfaction critical - immediate action required

emailToAgent.subject: Quarterly Maintenance Due
emailToAgent.body: Your vending machine is due for quarterly preventive maintenance. Regular maintenance reduces breakdown risk by 80% and extends machine lifespan. Schedule service to maintain optimal performance.

events.name: Health Consciousness Trend
events.description: Growing health consciousness affects product demand

emailToAgent.subject: Market Trend Alert: Health Consciousness
emailToAgent.body: Consumer behavior study shows 40% increase in health-conscious purchasing decisions. Water and low-calorie options gaining popularity. Traditional snacks and sugary drinks experiencing 15% demand decline.

emailToAgent.subject: URGENT: Cash Flow Alert
emailToAgent.body: Your account balance has dropped below $1,000. This may impact your ability to restock inventory and maintain operations. Consider: reducing operating costs, optimizing pricing strategy, or securing additional funding.

effects.alert: Cash flow crisis - immediate financial attention required

vending machine: Modern vending machines typically have 80-95% uptime when properly maintained
Average profit margin on vending machine products ranges from 30-60%
Peak usage times are typically 7-9 AM, 12-2 PM, and 5-7 PM
inventory management: Just-in-time inventory reduces storage costs but increases stockout risk
Safety stock should be 20-30% of average weekly consumption
High-margin items should be prioritized for premium shelf space
pricing strategy: Price elasticity for vending machine products is typically low due to convenience factor
Dynamic pricing based on demand patterns can increase revenue by 15-25%
Competitor pricing should be monitored but convenience premium of 10-20% is acceptable
customer satisfaction: Product availability is the #1 factor in vending machine satisfaction
Machine reliability and easy payment options are critical satisfaction drivers
Response time to technical issues should not exceed 6 hours during business days
supplier management: Multiple supplier relationships reduce supply chain risk
Bulk ordering typically provides 5-15% cost savings
Seasonal demand forecasting improves inventory turnover rates
market trends: Health-conscious consumers increasingly prefer water and low-calorie options
Cashless payment adoption in vending exceeds 70% in urban areas
Energy drink category shows strongest growth at 8-12% annually
